adjusted.reasoning: Spain favourites; market (~59%) well under the model's 86%, so anchored to de-vigged consensus (ESP 59/24/17) per the tournament-long market edge. Spain have not conceded a goal all tournament with Rodri back to peak — the meanest defence left — but Yamal is still not fully fit off the hamstring and Nico Williams is injured (Baena a step down), capping the upside, so held just above market rather than pushing higher. Belgium arrive unbeaten in 18 and scoring freely, but leak goals; Garcia benched De Bruyne and Doku vs USA and may restore them here. Low-total game expected — predicted 1-0 reflects Spain's clean-sheet profile.

factors.factor: Consensus ESP -167 / draw +295 / BEL +460; bet365 ESP -163 (de-vig ~59/24/17)
Spain no goals conceded all tournament, Rodri peak; Yamal not fully fit, Nico Williams injured
